description: Composition Blue T-shirt for men made of 100% organically grown cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Standard Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Perfect for your training sessions, this nike T-shirt is engineered to wick sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable, so you can concentrate better on your performance, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite shorts and sports shoes.
